title: M&T Bank Corporation to Participate in the Goldman Sachs US Financial Services Conference
text: BUFFALO, N.Y. , Nov. 21, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- M&T Bank Corporation ("M&T") (NYSE:MTB) will participate in the Goldman Sachs US Financial Services Conference being held in New York City.

title: M&T Bank Gives $100,000 to Five Charities in Maine to Support Lewiston Recovery Efforts
text: PORTLAND, Maine , Nov. 15, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The M&T Charitable Foundation, the philanthropic arm of M&T Bank (NYSE: MTB), announced today that it has committed $100,000 to five separate charities in Maine to support the ongoing response to the horrific mass shooting in Lewiston. "The tragedy in Lewiston is unfathomable and the effort to recover is immense," said Phil Cohen, Regional President of Maine for M&T Bank.

title: M&T Bank Corporation Announces Fourth Quarter Common Stock Dividend
text: BUFFALO, N.Y. , Nov. 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- M&T Bank Corporation ("M&T") (NYSE:MTB) announced that it has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.30 per share on its common stock.

title: Q3 List Of Banks And Their Increasing Paper Losses In Their Debt Securities Portfolios
text: Many banks have reported significantly larger unrealized securities losses in 3Q as interest rates rose in the quarter. The unrealized losses have grown so large as to be orange flags for a few banks. One of the reasons there could be new increased capital requirements is because of the large unrealized losses across the banking industry.

title: Banking and trucking: Is the economy rolling toward troubles?
text: The SPDR S&P Regional Banking ETF NYSEARCA: KRE closed 1.08% lower on November 6, after a privately held regional bank was closed by the Iowa Division of Banking.

title: 7 Dirt-Cheap Bank Stocks with Massive Dividends
text: Bank stocks are down badly this year. Borrowing costs are sky-high, cutting into net interest income.
